notes.title: Welcome to Beta
notes.body:
This is the Journery beta environment. Changes are deployed here first before going to prod.

Use this space to test new features — it resets to this seed content on every beta deploy.

notes.title: March 10
notes.body:
Good morning. Slept well. Big day ahead.

Things to get done:
  • Call the bank about the statement
  • Review the design mockups before standup
  • Pick up groceries on the way home

Feeling optimistic about the week overall.

notes.title: March 11
notes.body:
The standup went longer than expected. We need a better format.
Separate thought: I've been thinking about switching to async updates entirely. Fewer meetings, more written communication. Worth proposing.

Also remembered I need to renew the car registration this month.

notes.title: March 12
notes.body:
Quiet day. Mostly heads-down work.

Read a bit in the evening — halfway through the book now. The author's argument about attention is interesting but feels overstated.

Need to be more consistent about writing here. Even five minutes helps.

notes.title: Q2 Planning notes
notes.body:
Key themes for Q2:
  1. Ship the mobile improvements
  2. Reduce support backlog by 40%
  3. Hire one more engineer

Open questions:
  • Do we prioritise the API or the dashboard first?
  • What's the timeline for the data migration?
Risks: the contractor finishes in April, bandwidth is tight until then.

notes.title: App ideas
notes.body:
Random ideas, unfiltered:
  • Offline-first sync with CRDTs
  • End-to-end encrypted notes — keys stay on device
  • Keyboard shortcuts for everything
  • Weekly digest email: your notes from this week last year

The digest idea is the most interesting. Low effort, high value.
